steps.assistant_text: IDENTIFIED AS LIBULTRA osCreatePiManager (references/libreultra src/io/pimgr.c, field-for-field). NEW LEVER: TU-DEFINED global 'DevMgr gl_devmgr_6DA74 = {0};' produces the shared-lui $at store clusters (no extern spelling can); the splice imports it as UNDEF so undefined_syms resolves it. Kernel absolutes via gl_ref_00042CE0 (piThread) / 42E90 / 43E90 / 43EA8. addiu-form lui values are baked kernel RELOCS, not constants (ori-vs-addiu discriminator).
